220 g/m² , 70% Cotton 22% Polyester 8% Elasthane, 2/1S Twill Fabric

ArGiyim L is elasthane 220 g/m² fabric, it creates extra comfort to the user by high stretch function. The fabric can be stretched easliy during hard work conditions. ArGiyim L is the most requested fabric for elastic medical wear scrubs and pants.
